n: Book 7, Chapter 5: The Garden of Gondor

steps.t: Peregrin Took is east of Osgiliath, before the road rises into the hills of Ithilien. Gandalf told you that Pippin is riding with the Host of the West…
The Cross-roads of the King are east of Osgiliath, in Ithilien. Aragorn and the Host of the West are marching into Ithilien, and plan to stop at the C…
Aragorn is at the Cross-roads of the King, in Ithilien.
Trumpeters can be found at each of the roads that leave the Cross-roads of the King. After they have been told to sound their instruments, Aragorn ask…
Henneth Annûn is located north of the Cross-roads, in North Ithilien. Aragorn asked you to travel ahead of the host and come to the Ranger hideout at …
